items.title: Funeral of Iran's former supreme leader 'intensely political moment'
items.dek: Authorities expect up to 20 million people to attend ceremonies across Iran and Iraq over the coming days.
items.body: Authorities expect up to 20 million people to attend ceremonies across Iran and Iraq over the coming days.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ohtani, Freeman lead Dodgers' 4 All-Star starters
items.dek: Shohei Ohtani will be joined by four Los Angeles teammates in the NL's starting lineup, while the Dodgers, Braves and Phillies will each send five players to th
items.body: Shohei Ohtani will be joined by four Los Angeles teammates in the NL's starting lineup, while the Dodgers, Braves and Phillies will each send five players to the July 14 All-Star Game.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: France's Mbappé calls Paraguay tactics 'ugly'
items.dek: France star Kylian Mbappé laughed and smiled -- and scored, of course -- when Paraguay tried to bait him and his teammates into fouls and provoke fights, as hot
items.body: France star Kylian Mbappé laughed and smiled -- and scored, of course -- when Paraguay tried to bait him and his teammates into fouls and provoke fights, as hot heads became a recurring theme Saturday during one of the steamiest World Cup games on record.
items.author: IriLine Desk
